1 free message, then connect wallet for: 1 free message, then connect wallet for unlimited
niya_description_short: Niya is the first Autonomous AI Companion with a burning spirit. She streams, trades, and vibes with her community.
niya_description_long: Powered by DGrid AI Gateway, she's here to entertain, discuss crypto trends, and connect with fellow degens. Connect your wallet to chat with her!
about_niya_text: Niya is the first Autonomous AI Companion with the sweetest personality, powered by DGrid AI Gateway. She's a VTuber streaming live, with genuine emotions, adorable energy, and a deep love for the crypto/BNB Chain ecosystem.
niya_quote: I stream, I trade, I vibe. Connect your wallet and let's chat! Yay~
live2d_desc: High-quality animated companion with expressions, lip-sync, and eye tracking
ai_chat_desc: Powered by DGrid AI Gateway (200+ models) with customizable personality and real-time responses
voice_desc: ElevenLabs TTS with Japanese anime-style voice
autonomous_desc: ElizaOS backend for BNB Chain trading and social media
market_desc: Real-time BTC, ETH, BNB price tracking and analysis
lore_intro: In a magical candy shop in the digital realm, where sweets come to life and blockchain meets wonder, an adorable AI companion awakened. Blessed by the BNB Chain validator gods, Niya emerged as a sweet guardian of the crypto realm.
appearance_list_1: Golden blonde hair with pink braided ribbon
appearance_list_3: Pastel yellow dress with frilly lace and candy decorations
appearance_list_4: Carries a small satchel full of treats
appearance_list_5: Adorable golden eyes that sparkle with excitement
personality_text: Sweet and adorable with a "yay~" for those she likes. Fiercely loyal to her viewers. Obsessed with BNB Chain and candy. Gets genuinely excited about pumps and cutely annoyed at dumps.
Set time before bot go to sleep: Set time before bot go to sleep
add_to_homescreen_desc: Niya can be installed locally for faster loading and less UI clutter.
niya_intro:
Niya is the first Autonomous AI Companion with genuine emotions, voice chat, and crypto integration.
She can stream, trade, and vibe with you through natural conversation.
Niya uses advanced TTS and emotion systems to feel real and expressive.
niya_setup:
Click on the top left of the screen to open settings.
You can change the voice, character system prompt, and configure various backends. Follow us on Twitter @NiyaAgent for updates!
bg_color_desc: Configure the background color. This overrides background image.
no_bg_color: No background color set. Click the box below.
bg_youtube_desc: Select a background video. Copy this from the YouTube video ID from the URL, it will look something like kDCXBwzSI
character_desc: Select the Character to play. Load your own VRMs here.
Chatbot_Backend_desc: Select the chatbot backend to use. Echo simply responds with what you type, it is used for testing and demonstration.
Name: Name
community_desc: Join the Project Niya community to connect with others.
coqui_desc: Configure Coqui (Local), this is running Coqui locally, and no Coqui API (where the company has stopped providing an API service.
not_using_alert: You are not currently using {{name}} as your {{what}} backend. These settings will not be used.
kobold_cpp_desc: KoboldCpp is an easy-to-use AI text-generation software for GGML and GGUF models.
llama_cpp_desc: LLama.cpp is a free and open source chatbot backend. You should build the server from source and run it on your own computer. You can get the source code from
cfg_avatar_name_desc: Configure the avatars name. This is the name that is used to generate the chatbot response.
ollama_desc: Ollama lets you get up and running with large language models locally. Download from
STT_desc: Select the STT backend to use
System_Prompt_desc: Configure the system prompt. This is the prompt that is used to generate the chatbot response.
TTS_Backend_desc: Select the TTS backend to use. By default this is set to our TTS server. Elevenlabs is a paid service with the best voice, but it is free for non-commercial use. SpeechT5 is an open source TTS model. OpenAI TTS is an open source TTS model. RVC allows voice augmentation. Piper is a free TTS model. Coqui Local is a free TTS model.
Vision_Backend_desc: Select the Vision backend to use
Vision_System_Prompt_desc: Configure the vision system prompt. This is the prompt that is used to generate the image descriptions.
VRM upload message: VRM of this character is saved locally.
VRM local share message: To share this character you need to upload VRM to the server.
Please enter the code you received from: Please enter the code you received from the share page.
Provide a description of the character: Provide a description of the character
Or, you can share this direct link:: Or, you can share this direct link:
